user_case_beats.beat: Risk evidence accumulates and countdown advances
user_case_beats.action: Click Replay evidence or adjust threshold
user_case_beats.state_change: confidence meter, countdown dial, crossing item, and proof rail update
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: POST /api/evidence/tick returns EvidenceRecord rows and tests/onboard.spec.ts covers the hero path

user_case_beats.state_change: approval record is created and identity status changes ACTIVE -> CONTAINED
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: POST /api/containment/approve returns approvalId, sessionId, roleId, ownerId-compatible payload

user_case_beats.action: Open mobile proof dossier and export
user_case_beats.state_change: verification result, evidence chain, threshold policy, approval, execution, and export affordance are visible
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: POST /api/dossier/build returns sessionId, ownerId, roleId, D1/KV/R2 storage contract fields

acceptance.requirement: Same evidence update drives confidence, dial, and proof rail
Dossier is readable on mobile without live Splunk credentials
